analysis.reasoning: Core message: Zakharova criticizes Poland (Warsaw) for selfishly undermining fair competition and harming European energy and environmental security regarding Nord Stream 2. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent): The tweet depicts a Western ally (Poland) as acting selfishly, ignoring fair principles and consumer interests, and undermining security—framing the West/ally as hostile and immoral. This fits RU1. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): No mention of Russia promoting a multilateral alternative or non-Western cooperation. Not supported. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): The tweet does not portray Russia’s benevolence or partnership; it is a critique of Poland. Not supported. RU4 (Russian history is admirable): No historical content. Not supported. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): No highlighting of Russian achievements. Not supported. RU6 (Russia culture/nature): Not relevant. Conclusion: Only RU1 is promoted.
